task: Generalize Day 1 AI tool install guide beyond Claude

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Extended preferred LLM normalization and labels to include Genspark and Grok.
Expanded Day 1 install guide copy for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Genspark, and Grok.
When the tool is auto or not chosen, Day 1 now asks the learner to choose one AI tool first and lists ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Genspark, and Grok.
Bumped Day 1 practice_lab_version to refresh existing uncompleted Day 1 snapshots with the new multi-tool install guide.
Updated frontend labels and curriculum selector options to include Genspark, Grok, and an explicit undecided option.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DhvRQnh9.js

residual_risk: Official app availability can vary by country and device; each guide includes a browser fallback.
